title: rubus costeanus
intro: Rubus costeanus, also known as the Costea blackberry or Costea raspberry, is a rare species of flowering plant in the rose family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and fever, due to its astringent and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Rubus costeanus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, often combined with other herbs to enhance its effects.
